mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y') AS TOTAL_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SOLD_YN = 'N') AS ACTIVE_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SOLD_YN = 'Y') AS SOLD_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BADGE_TYPE = 'RECOMMEND') AS RECOMMEND_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BADGE_TYPE = 'URGENT') AS URGENT_CNT

SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NM , C.CAT_NM , (SELECT SC.CAT_NM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY SC WHERE SC.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND SC.SUB_CAT_CD = A.SUB_CAT_CD) AS SUB_CAT_NM , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SOLD_YN , A.BADGE_TYPE , A.VIEW_CNT , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY C ON C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 9

SELECT A.PROP_CD , A.PROP_NM , C.CAT_NM , A.VIEW_CNT , A.SOLD_YN FROM TB_PROPERTY A LEFT JOIN TB_PROP_CATEGORY C ON C.CAT_CD = A.CAT_CD AND C.SUB_CAT_CD = '00' WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND DATE(RGT_DTM) = CURDATE() ) AS TODAY_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BBS_PST R WHERE R.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND R.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND R.PST_LVL > 0 AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ) ) AS UNANSWERED_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' AND DATE_FORMAT(RGT_DTM, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') ) AS MONTH_CNT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_BBS_PST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND PST_LVL = 0 AND NOTICE_YN = 'N' ) AS TOTAL_CNT

SELECT A.PST_CD , A.PST_NM , A.RGT_USR_NM , A.RGT_PHONE , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS RGT_DTM , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BBS_PST R WHERE R.BRD_CD = A.BRD_CD AND R.ROT_PST_CD = A.PST_CD AND R.PST_LVL > 0 AND R.DEL_YN = 'N' AND R.USE_YN = 'Y' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REPLY_YN FROM TB_BBS_PST A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.BRD_CD = '3ccd942dfcbf11f08771908d6ec6e544' AND A.PST_LVL = 0 AND A.NOTICE_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REPLY_YN ASC, A.IDX DESC LIMIT 10
